name: delivery-planning-suite
description: Detachable delivery planning suite for converting PRD scope into technical scope, release roadmap, effort estimates, delivery effects, capability enablement, Skill/MCP routing, governed Codex task packages, development-plan review, and quality review.

interface.shortDescription: Turns PRDs into governed technical delivery plans.
interface.longDescription: A detachable suite that translates confirmed PRD scope into technical modules, phased release plans, effort assumptions, delivery outcomes, capability enablement, Skill/MCP routing, development governance, Codex-ready task blueprints, send-before development-plan reviews, and quality checks without mutating product decisions.
defaultPrompt: Create a technical delivery path for this PRD.
Split this MVP into release phases with effort estimates.
Plan the Skill, MCP, harness, and governance enablement for semi-automated development.
Review this Codex development plan for blockers, executability, and approval gates.
Review this delivery plan for scope, timing, and risk.
